description_long: This is a compact, single-story bungalow with a simple rectangular footprint and a low-pitched hip roof. The front facade features a centered door accessed by a small set of steps, flanked symmetrically by two large windows. The sides and rear of the building are plain, with the left side showing three evenly spaced windows and the right and rear facades lacking any visible openings. The exterior appears to be finished in a smooth, uniform material, likely painted plaster or siding, with minimal decorative detailing. The roof is solid and unadorned, contributing to the clean, understated appearance. The overall design suggests a practical, modest residential structure suitable for urban or suburban neighborhoods.
description: A single-story, rectangular bungalow with a hip roof, symmetrical front windows, and a centered entry door. The exterior is plain and smooth, with minimal ornamentation.
description_view_0: Front view showing a centered door with steps and two large, symmetrical windows.
description_view_1: Right side view with no visible windows or doors, showing the plain wall and hip roof.
description_view_2: Rear view with three evenly spaced windows and a small vent or detail near the base.
description_view_3: Left side view, plain with no visible windows or doors, highlighting the simple wall and roof.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical front-facing windows, evenly spaced side windows
